reviews.review_description: Very fun game love playing it. My favorite VR game yet reccomend highly very fun and free
Yes

This is by far the best Free game on here. You'll feel like a bad a$$ as you shoot down zombies. Playing pop is challenging but fun. 
I wish there was some customization and more of a story, but it is quite fun and very entertaining

Didn’t know what to expect when I got this but, MAN am I glad I have this. This is a fun game. Visually stunning. The clarity and depth is just incredible.  HIGHLY recommend this one. Make sure you’ve got some room around you cause you’ll be swinging your arms for sure. For the multiplayer matches I had to stand up to get the proper shot off.  Since it’s a quick draw shoot out, it’s easier to reach down for your holster to draw your gun when you’re standing.  

Get this! It is fun and looks INCREDIBLE. 

If the developer reads this. Make more games. Maybe allow ability to make and play with friends.  Oh a shooting gallery for practice would also be awesome. Great work!
I love it
Love this game excellent
Not bad for a free game. I just wish there was co-op. It's fun and all, just gets boring fairly quick.

Multiplayer has voice chat that you can not disable. You will be forced to listen to the screeching voices of obnoxious children saying terrible things if you make the mistake of choosing multiplayer.
It just wont install
This game is so good there are duels,zombie fights,I never see better gear vr game ok!?
when I saw this game was free and multiplayer I  downloaded it right away this game is really cool if your looking for a shooting game on Oculus GO this is the one.
Awsome gamee. High quality graphics. Very accurate control. A really good shooter. And it is also impossible to get after the 10th wave.

This is literally the first game I downloaded on the Go, and I gotta say it’s very clean and fluid! The graphics are crisp, colors are just right, and the feeling of flicking over a virtual revolver to reload then let the rounds fly... truly superb. Voice work is solid, animations are what you’d expect from a game with this cartoonish feel, and the combination of all these efforts really do produce a very immersive gameplay experience. Highly recommend this for fun and for demonstrating the GO for friends who might be interested but haven’t had a chance to get their hands on a headset yet

So, I have been playing this game a bit, and the game is great. I’m not a fan of the zombie mode, but dueling is incredible, and is by far the best part of the whole game. As you probably know, Dead and Buried isn’t a game meant to be gritty. Instead, it’s a funny game, and the community’s overall mood while playing is great. Also, you can dab.
